zh.lifeSummary: 當Henri II de Bar於大約1190年出生在法國洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克時，他的父親Thiébaut Ier de Bar35歲，母親Ermesinde de Brienne46歲。他於1218年11月12日與Philippa de Dreux在法國洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1239年登記服兵役。他於1239年在巴西阿可被列為croisé avec thibaud de champagne, roi de navarre (débarquent à acre, 01/09/1239)。他去世於1239年11月13日在巴勒斯坦قطاع غزة享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henri II de Bar于大约1190年出生在法国洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克时，他的父亲Thiébaut Ier de Bar35岁，母亲Ermesinde de Brienne46岁。他于1218年11月12日与Philippa de Dreux在法国洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1239年登记服兵役。他于1239年在巴西阿可被列为croisé avec thibaud de champagne, roi de navarre (débarquent à acre, 01/09/1239)。他去世于1239年11月13日在巴勒斯坦قطاع غزة享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Moshe, Giora, Ilan, Arie, Eliahu, Hadassa, Haim, Menashe, Mordechai, Nadav, Nir, Noam.  French Dany, Francois, Henri.  German Hans, Gerhard, Willi.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber (see Baer 2).
German (Bär): variant of Baer 1 ‘bear’ and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this and of its cognate Bähr (see Bahr 2).

variants.name: Baer
meanings: German (also Bär): from Middle High German ber ‘bear’, a nickname for someone thought to resemble the animal in some way, a metonymic occupational name for someone who kept a performing bear, or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house distinguished by the sign of a bear. In some cases it may derive from a personal name containing this element. Compare Bar 2.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber, from Yiddish ber ‘bear’. Compare Bar 1.
Germanized form (also Bär) of Sorbian Běr: see Bar 3.

variants.name: Dubar
meanings: French (mainly Nord): habitational name, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

variants.name: Debar
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Pierre.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

nameMeanings.name: Henri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Henri II de Bar was born about 1190, in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, his father, Thiébaut Ier de Bar, was 35 and his mother, Ermesinde de Brienne, was 46. He married Philippa de Dreux on 12 November 1218, in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1239. In 1239, at the age of 50, his occupation is listed as croisé avec thibaud de champagne, roi de navarre (débarquent à acre, 01/09/1239) in Acre, Brazil. He died on 13 November 1239, in Gaza Strip, Palestine, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henri II de Bar est né environ 1190, à Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, son père, Thiébaut Ier de Bar, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Ermesinde de Brienne, avait 46 ans. Il a épousé Philippa de Dreux le 12 novembre 1218, à Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1239. En 1239, à l’âge de 50 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est croisé avec thibaud de champagne, roi de navarre (débarquent à acre, 01/09/1239) à Acre, Brésil. Il est décédé le 13 novembre 1239, à Bande de Gaza, Palestine, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henri II de Bar um 1190 in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thiébaut Ier de Bar 35 und seine Mutter Ermesinde de Brienne 46. Er hat am 12. November 1218 in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich Philippa de Dreux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1239 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1239, als er 50 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als croisé avec thibaud de champagne, roi de navarre (débarquent à acre, 01/09/1239) in Acre, Brasilien aufgeführt. Er starb am 13. November 1239 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Gazastreifen, Palästina.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henri II de Bar è nato il circa 1190 nel Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, il suo padre, Thiébaut Ier de Bar, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Ermesinde de Brienne, aveva 46 anni. Lui sposato Philippa de Dreux il 12 novembre 1218, nel Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1239. Nel 1239, all'età di 50 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come croisé avec thibaud de champagne, roi de navarre (débarquent à acre, 01/09/1239) nel Acre, Brasile. Morì il 13 novembre 1239, nel Striscia di Gaza, Palestina, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henri II de Barが約1190年にフランスロレィヌメウゼバー-レ-ドウックで生まれた時，父Thiébaut Ier de Barは35歳，母Ermesinde de Brienneは46歳であった。1218年11月12日にフランスロレィヌメウゼバー-レ-ドウックでPhilippa de Dreuxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1239年に兵役登録をした。1239年，50歳の時，ブラジルアクアでの職業はcroisé avec thibaud de champagne, roi de navarre (débarquent à acre, 01/09/1239)と記録されている。彼は1239年11月13日にパレスチナガザ地区で50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henri II de Bar(이)가 대략 1190년 프랑스 로레이인 우스 바-레-드크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thiébaut Ier de Bar(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Ermesinde de Brienne(은)는 46세였다. 그는 1218년 11월 12일 프랑스 로레이인 우스 바-레-드크에서 Philippa de Dreux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1239년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1239년, 50세의 나이로 그의 직업은 브라질 악르에서 croisé avec thibaud de champagne, roi de navarre (débarquent à acre, 01/09/1239)이었다. 그는 1239년 11월 13일 팔레스타인 قطاع غزة에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henri II de Bar nasceu aproximadamente 1190, em Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Thiébaut Ier de Bar, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Ermesinde de Brienne, tinha 46 anos. Ele casou-se com Philippa de Dreux em 12 de novembro de 1218, em Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1239. Em 1239, com 50 anos, sua profissão aparece como croisé avec thibaud de champagne, roi de navarre (débarquent à acre, 01/09/1239) em Acre, Brasil. Ele faleceu em 13 de novembro de 1239, em Faixa de Gaza, Palestina, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henri II de Bar родился около 1190 г. в местности бар-ле-дук, меус, лорреаин, Франция, его отцу по имени Thiébaut Ier de Bar было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermesinde de Brienne, 46. Он женился на женщине по имени Philippa de Dreux 12 ноября 1218 г. в местности бар-ле-дук, меус, лорреаин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. В 1239 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1239 году, в возрасте 50 лет, работал по профессии croisé avec thibaud de champagne, roi de navarre (débarquent à acre, 01/09/1239) в местности акр, Бразилия. Он умер 13 ноября 1239 г. в местности Сектор Газа, Палестина в возрасте 50 лет.

sm.from about 1222 to 1249: mai le e tusa o le 1222 e o'o I le 1249

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henri II de Bar nació aproximadamente 1190, en Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Thiébaut Ier de Bar, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Ermesinde de Brienne, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Philippa de Dreux el 12 de noviembre de 1218, en Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1239. En 1239, a la edad de 50 años, su ocupación registrada era croisé avec thibaud de champagne, roi de navarre (débarquent à acre, 01/09/1239) en Acre, Brasil. Murió el 13 de noviembre de 1239, en Franja de Gaza, Palestina, a la edad de 50 años.
